abilities.name: Blade Rush
abilities.text: While resolving the Charge action, this model may move through enemy models. Deal 1 damage to enemy models moved through this way.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Innovative Business Practices
abilities.text: After this model is dealt damage by an attack, it may drain a (soulstone) to have the attacker gain a Slow token.

actions.name: Ancestral Tomahawk
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may look at the top card of its fate deck and may choose to discard it.

triggers.name: Siphon Life
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and this model heals 1.

actions.name: Bleeding Edge
actions.effects: Make a Scheme marker completely within range. Enemy models within (x)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 12 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Steel Momentum
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the made marker.

actions.name: Democratic Election
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Choose any number of models within range to heal 1. Then, deal 1 damage to the same number of models within range.

triggers.name: Lethal Aura
triggers.text: This model gains an Aura (Hazardous) token.

actions.name: Hostile Takeover
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a marker. Make a Scheme marker within 2" of the target, then remove it.

triggers.name: Glory of Ridley
triggers.text: Draw a card of value 1-3 from your discard pile.
